title: Vender's Game - A Flan's Mod Content Pack
description: A variety of firearms to unleash on your Minecraft world!
body:
# Vender's Game - A Flan's Mod Content Pack

![Vender and a Phantek Auto-12](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a83783b8ab6c737eb81aa7da33fc24ee47267728.png)

Vender has been scouring all corners of all dimensions for the ultimate weapon selection for you and your friends. These are some of the brands they have procured for you:

## HitMarket - Personal Protection on a Budget

![The HitMarket weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4181e7a3f1610f9d9fa2de6e2ecfefcfea463a1.png)

HitMarket provides quality armament at low low prices. If you need a quick fix for your creeper problems on a budget, HM has the piece for you.

## PhanTek - Hi-Tech Solutions for Modern Problems

![The PhanTek weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/798348da43e19fbad98360c24d80b83680f88a6f.png)

PhanTek is the market leader in weapon innovations, with high tech attachments using their proprietary PhanTex polymer. (A division of PhanTek Polymers PLC.)

## Flint & Cobbleson - Classic Arms for the Discerning Crafter

![Flint & Cobbleson weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23fac1a00ce1c47dfe3442ab935534c2628b2351.png)

Flint & Cobbleson deals only in classic arms, with luxurious wood finishes and a special attention to detail.

![Vender the NPC](https://i.imgur.com/Y41yTeM.png)

Vender can be called in to service your military supply needs with their Interdimensional Rapid Response Relay. They will teleport directly to your location with a fine selection of guns and bullets to suit your needs. These Relays can be found in various loot chests throughout the Overworld and Nether.

[If you have Basic Parts Pack (or another parts pack) installed]
Each manufacturer provides their own workbench so you can produce their branded armaments from home. (Parts not included. The manufacturers take no responsiblity for accidents arising from using these workbenches, including but not limited to; burning, exploding, radiation damage, melting, exploding or loss of limbs)

Recipes



Crafting Station Recipes



HitMarket Foldable Workstation

![HitMarket workbench crafting recipe](https://i.imgur.com/gYyPgwR.png)

PhanTek Fabrikator

![PhanTek workbench crafting recipe](https://i.imgur.com/rgZo6Hv.png)

Flint & Cobbleson's Handcrafting Station

![Flint & Cobbleson workbench crafting recipe](https://i.imgur.com/AyzH73h.png)
